title: opa
summary:
An open source, general-purpose policy engine. 
 Open Policy Agent OPA is an open source, general-purpose policy engine that enables unified, context-aware policy enforcement across the entire stack. OPA is proud to be a graduated project in the Cloud Native Computing Foundationhttpscncf.io CNCF landscape. For details read the CNCF announcementhttpswww.cncf.ioannouncements20210204cloud-native-computing-foundation-announces-open-policy-agent-graduation. learn about the Rego language as well as ho
